mission.title: distribution: Registry - Allow minimum TLS version to be configurable
mission.description: Registry - Allow minimum TLS version to be configurable. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current distribution deployment
steps.description:
Verify your distribution version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
helm list -n distribution 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working distribution installation.

steps.title: Review distribution configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant distribution configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get configmap -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=distribution
```
Similar to #2715 I have a high-security environment where no TLS1.0 or TLS1.1 traffic is allowed, and registry currently hardcodes the minimum TLS version.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Registry - Allow minimum TLS version to be configurable
steps.description:
```
http:
  tls:
    minimumtls: tls1.2
```
An omitted or unrecognized string results in the same TLS1.0 support we have today, and allowed strings are in the updated docs - "tls1.0", "tls1.1", "tls1.2".
```yaml
http:
  tls:
    minimumtls: tls1.2
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n distribution -l app.kubernetes.io/name=distribution
kubectl get events -n distribution --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Registry - Allow minimum TLS version to be configurable" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
```
http:
  tls:
    minimumtls: tls1.2
```
An omitted or unrecognized string results in the same TLS1.0 support we have today, and allowed strings are in the updated docs - "tls1.0", "tls1.1", "tls1.2".
codeSnippets: time="2020-06-26T18:48:58Z" level=warning msg="Ignoring unrecognized environment variable REGISTRY_HTTP_TLS_MINIMUMTLS"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with distribution installed or the issue environment reproducible.
